data.title: DOJO PUREX 60K Debuts at TPE 2026 as the World's First INSTA-JUICED™ Vape
data.description: At the TPE 2026 in Las Vegas, DOJO, in collaboration with VAPORESSO, unveiled its newest products. The highlight of their showcase was the introduction of PUREX 60K, the first-ever INSTA-JUICED™ vape globally. Additionally, they launched the SPHERE S 40K, further broadening their product range.

data.title: Hackers pilfered $169M from 34 DeFi platforms in Q1. Biggest hit: $40M in Jan from Step Finance.
data.description: In January, there was a significant cyber attack on a decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol, resulting in a $40 million private key breach of the portfolio management platform Step Finance. This incident marked the largest attack on a DeFi protocol in the quarter.

China's cumulative installed capacity of new-type energy storage is expected to exceed 370 million kW by 2030, more than 2.5 times the level at the end of the 14th Five-Year Plan period (2021-2025), according to an industry white paper released recently.

data.title: DRAG 6 Steals the Spotlight at Vapexpo Paris 2026: A Masterclass in Design, Durability, and Playability
data.description: The recently concluded Vapexpo Paris 2026 featured a standout device that captured the attention of attendees with its appealing design and innovative features. The DRAG 6 emerged as a top conversation starter at the event, earning widespread acclaim both online and offline. Its popularity was evident as crowds flocked to witness its debut, with many praising its aesthetics and engineering. The most common compliment heard throughout the show was the admiration for the device's design. One attendee expressed their admiration, signaling the positive reception of the DRAG 6.

data.title: Elizabeth Warren Says She Has A 'Question' For MrBeast: Here's What She's Asking
data.description: On Thursday, Senator Elizabeth Warren from Massachusetts took to social media platform X and posted about having inquiries for popular YouTuber Jimmy Donaldson, also known as MrBeast. Senator Warren's post mentioned a 12-page letter she had previously sent to MrBeast, expressing her questions regarding his venture into finance. In a detailed letter, Warren asked both Donaldson and Beast Industries CEO Jeffrey Housenbold to elaborate on the company's plans subsequent to its acquisition of the teen-focused fintech app Step. The senator requested clarity on various aspects including compliance, marketing strategies, and protections in place for young users. The New York Times reported these details, emphasizing Warren's concerns about cryptocurrency implications.

data.title: HAFNIA LIMITED: Hafnia Enters into Newbuild Agreement for Eight Medium-Range (MR) Product Tankers
data.description: Singapore based company Hafnia Limited, with ticker codes “HAFNI” on the Oslo Stock Exchange and “HAFN” on the New York Stock Exchange, has confirmed the signing of a deal to build eight Medium-Range (MR) newbuild product tankers at Hyundai Heavy Industries. The agreement amounts to around USD 405 million, and the vessels are anticipated to be delivered from Q3 2028 to Q2 2029. Hafnia expressed satisfaction with the order placed with Hyundai Heavy Industries for these modern tankers.
US intelligence also shows a "large percentage" of Iran’s coastal defense cruise missiles intact, allowing them to keep the Strait of Hormuz closed.
